idea.title: Coin Cascade
idea.hook: Drop coins into the vault well — two of a kind FUSE into a richer coin, chain the cascades, and climb from copper to crown before a column overflows.
idea.hook_ru: Бросай монеты в колодец-сокровищницу — две одинаковые СЛИВАЮТСЯ в монету богаче, устраивай цепочки каскадов и поднимайся от меди к короне, пока колонка не переполнилась.
idea.prototype: A 5-column vertical 'vault well' (COLS=5 x ROWS=9, portrait). A next coin with a tier shows at the top, rendered BOTH as a number (2,4,8,16,...) AND a distinct per-tier coin skin/color. Input (max 2): tap a column to drop on mobile, or move a cursor left-right (arrows/mouse) then drop (Space/click) on desktop; boost buttons are taps. The coin falls to the lowest empty cell of the chosen column. If the landed coin equals the one beneath it they FUSE into the next tier (value doubles) in the lower cell, the column settles, and the fused coin re-checks the coin now beneath it and CHAIN-fuses repeatedly. Each fuse pays run-coins (= resulting tier value x payoutMult, plus a chain bonus) into a visible wallet with a reward-pile pop. Run-coins are IN-SESSION ONLY. Three boosts spend run-coins (prices scale): Hammer (delete any one coin), Swap (reroll the next coin's value), Cyclone (one gravity-settle + equal-adjacent collapse pass). Lose with NO timer: when a placed coin would stack above the top line of a column, gs='GAMEOVER' (space scarcity is the pressure). 10-minute arc: time-to-first-fun <15s (a fuse reachable in 2-3 drops); escalation on density AND new content (the incoming tier pool widens as the highest tier climbs, and NEW tier skins/names unlock as reached: copper, silver, gold, sapphire, ruby, emerald, amethyst, crown, vault); a late twist (past junkThreshold score, un-fuseable rust/junk coins start appearing and must be Hammered or buried); tier-up banners + bigger payouts as you climb.
idea.mutation_of: Block Dropping Merge / Drop-the-Number column merge
idea.why_novel: First number-doubling COLUMN drop-merge in our catalog — distinct from physics-Suika (soviet_suika) and creature drop-3 (critter_keep); adds an in-run coin economy + boosts. The verb is aim-a-column-and-drop-to-double, a gravity column merge, not a physics bounce-merge (soviet_suika) nor a place-three-to-merge (critter_keep / beast_bazaar). Fuses the #1 CTR archetype today (puzzle_objects) with the #2 (idle_tycoon money/reward-pile) via the in-run wallet + reward-pile juice.
idea.non_timer_pressure: column overflow / space scarcity — every non-fusing drop permanently raises a column; a column at ROWS height receiving another coin overflows. No countdown. Junk coins past junkThreshold eat space and ratchet the pressure.
idea.lose_condition: gs='GAMEOVER' when a dropped coin lands in a column whose stack height is already ROWS (column stacks above the top line). Reachable from careless random play well within 60s; verified via forced overflow.

sources.title: Merge Dale
sources.snippet: idle_tycoon / merge market anchor — money/upgrade reward pile visible at a glance, glossy tactile objects. Borrowed object scale + saturation + the rich-reward-pile cover direction.

sources.title: Block Dropping Merge
sources.snippet: The Drop-the-Number column-merge family this game is the direct mutation of — drop numbered blocks into columns, equal ones fuse and chain. The proven merge mechanic our catalog lacked.

sources.title: Firestone - idle RPG (кликер idle онлайн RPG)
sources.snippet: idle_tycoon CTR reference — the money/reward-pile, climbing-numbers fantasy. Signal for the in-run coin economy + escalating payouts.

synthesizer_brief: merge family tops our retention rollup; merge/idle-tycoon dominate today's CTR; build the one proven merge mechanic we lack — number-doubling column drop-merge — with an in-run economy for loop depth. Crosses the #1 CTR archetype (puzzle_objects, weight 18809) with the #2 (idle_tycoon money/reward-pile), borrowing object scale + saturation from Merge Dale / Block Dropping Merge / Firestone. Built as the addictive-10-minute-loop milestone only (run-coins are in-session; no cross-session retention this pass).

alternatives.title: Mint Foreman
alternatives.hook: Active production-chain tycoon — feed the mint, stamp coins, automate the line.
alternatives.why_novel: economy genre, underbuilt for us — but idle loops fail the active-10min gate, and it would overlap the just-shipped smelter_tycoon production chain.

alternatives.title: Hive Survivor
alternatives.hook: Survivor-like auto-shooter — dodge the swarm, auto-fire, stack upgrades.
alternatives.why_novel: top 10-min loop family — but devourling already ships the survivor-like auto-shooter, so a second would cannibalise rather than expand.

alternatives.title: Prism Match
alternatives.hook: Juicy match-3 with a light meta-progression and combo cascades.
alternatives.why_novel: high ceiling genre — but our puzzle/match category is net-disliked in analytics, so the EV is lower than a fresh merge mechanic.
